title: Verified Development
description: Specification-first development workflow with ATDD, layered verification gates, and two-stage review agents. Enforces TDD, mechanical quality gates (lint, test, coverage, mutation, security, dead code), and AI-powered code review. Language-aware, starting with Go.
features: 5-phase workflow: specify, plan, implement, verify, review
Two-stage review: spec-compliance gate, then 12 quality agents
Go verification pipeline: golangci-lint (43 linters), gremlins mutation testing, gosec, govulncheck
TDD enforcement with Actor-based BDD testing patterns
UI specification with design system, competitive research, and a11y review
Codebase mapping and living context docs
Compressed /quick workflow for bug fixes with proportional review
Justfile-based verification pipeline with configurable thresholds
